title: St. Joseph's Church, Juhu

overview.short: St. Joseph's Church, Juhu is a much-loved spiritual town in Maharashtra, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Joseph's Church, Juhu is a Catholic church located in Juhu, Mumbai.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vile Parle
topPlaces.description: Vile Parle (Marathi pronunciation: [ʋile paːɾle], also known as Parla) is a suburb and also the name of the railway station in the Western suburb of Mumbai. Vile Parle has a significantly strong base of Marathi and Gujarati population.

topPlaces.name: Juhu
topPlaces.description: Juhu (pronunciation: [d͡ʒuɦuː]) is a coastal suburb in the Mumbai Suburban district, located on the western coast of Salsette Island. It is known for its sprawling Juhu Beach.

topPlaces.name: Irla
topPlaces.description: Irla is a neighborhood in suburban Mumbai, part of Vile Parle. It is located near the upmarket Juhu area.

topPlaces.name: Juhu Aerodrome
topPlaces.description: Juhu Aerodrome (ICAO: VAJJ) is located in Juhu, an upmarket residential suburb of Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. It is served primarily by general aviation aircraft and helicopters.

topPlaces.name: Versova, Mumbai
topPlaces.description: Versova (ISO: Varsovā, pronounced [ʋəɾsoːʋaː]) is an upmarket neighborhood in north-western Mumbai. It is known for its beach and the Versova Fort.

topPlaces.name: Japan Air Lines Flight 472 (1972)
topPlaces.description: Japan Air Lines Flight 472 was a flight from London to Tokyo via Frankfurt, Rome, Beirut, Tehran, Bombay, Bangkok and Hong Kong. On September 24, 1972, the flight landed at Juhu Aerodrome near Bombay, India instead of the city's much larger Santacruz Airport (now Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport) and overran the runway, resulting in the aircraft being written off after being damaged beyond economic repair.

topPlaces.name: D.N. Nagar
topPlaces.description: D N Nagar is named after Dadabhai Naoroji. It is located within the triangle of Lokhandwala Complex, Seven Bungalows and Juhu Vile Parle Development Scheme (JVPD).

topPlaces.name: Four Bungalows
topPlaces.description: Four Bungalows is a neighbourhood in Mumbai, India. It is located about three kilometres from Andheri station and is in the vicinity of Lokhandwala Complex and Seven Bungalows.

items.note: Vile Parle (Marathi pronunciation: [ʋile paːɾle], also known as Parla) is a suburb and also the name of the railway station in the Western suburb of Mumbai. Vile Parle has a significantly strong base of Marathi and Gujarati population.
Juhu (pronunciation: [d͡ʒuɦuː]) is a coastal suburb in the Mumbai Suburban district, located on the western coast of Salsette Island. It is known for its sprawling Juhu Beach.
Irla is a neighborhood in suburban Mumbai, part of Vile Parle. It is located near the upmarket Juhu area.
Juhu Aerodrome (ICAO: VAJJ) is located in Juhu, an upmarket residential suburb of Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. It is served primarily by general aviation aircraft and helicopters.
Versova (ISO: Varsovā, pronounced [ʋəɾsoːʋaː]) is an upmarket neighborhood in north-western Mumbai. It is known for its beach and the Versova Fort.

Japan Air Lines Flight 472 was a flight from London to Tokyo via Frankfurt, Rome, Beirut, Tehran, Bombay, Bangkok and Hong Kong. On September 24, 1972, the flight landed at Juhu Aerodrome near Bombay, India instead of the city's much larger Santacruz Airport (now Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport) and overran the runway, resulting in the aircraft being written off after being damaged beyond economic repair.
D N Nagar is named after Dadabhai Naoroji. It is located within the triangle of Lokhandwala Complex, Seven Bungalows and Juhu Vile Parle Development Scheme (JVPD).
Four Bungalows is a neighbourhood in Mumbai, India. It is located about three kilometres from Andheri station and is in the vicinity of Lokhandwala Complex and Seven Bungalows.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Joseph's Church, Juhu?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Joseph's Church, Juhu is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Joseph's Church, Juhu?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (19 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Joseph's Church, Juhu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Joseph's Church, Juhu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Joseph's Church, Juhu?
faq.a: Stays in St. Joseph's Church, Juhu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Joseph's Church, Juhu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vile Parle, Juhu, Irla, Juhu Aerodrome, Versova, Mumbai.
